title: habenaria trilobulata
intro: Habenaria trilobulata, also known as the three-lobed orchid, is a type of orchid species that is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and the Pacific Islands. The medicinal properties of Habenaria trilobulata include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its roots and leaves. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat a range of conditions, including fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Habenaria trilobulata can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used as a topical application to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
